phase: P0 AUTH CONTRACT FIX — /AUTH/ME REJECTS VALID JWT AFTER VERIFICATION

loginTokenProof.detail: verify:live-login-contract: POST /auth/login returned 200 with token and user payload for pilot@test.com.

jwtDiagnosticsProof.detail: verify:live-login-contract: /__jwt-diagnostics externalTokenTest.success=true and /__auth-debug verifyResult.success=true on the same token.

authMe200Proof.detail: verify:live-login-contract (post-deploy): GET /auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <token> returned 200 and user role ADMIN.

tokenSubjectNormalizationProof.detail: sessionIntegrityValidator now normalizes token subject from decoded.id || decoded.userId || decoded.sub and returns userId consistently.

passwordChangedAtToleranceProof.detail: auth middleware compares passwordChangedAtMs > tokenIssuedAtMs + 5000 before rejecting, preventing false rejection of freshly issued tokens.

roleHydrationProof.detail: auth consistency failures now return explicit safe code TOKEN_VERIFIED_ROLE_HYDRATION_FAILED; valid ADMIN role from /auth/me accepted.

backendAuthContractProof.detail: auth middleware returns explicit safe 401 codes (TOKEN_PAYLOAD_MISSING_SUBJECT, TOKEN_VERIFIED_USER_NOT_FOUND, TOKEN_VERIFIED_PASSWORD_CHANGED_AFTER_IAT, TOKEN_VERIFIED_ROLE_HYDRATION_FAILED) without exposing secrets.

rbacProof.detail: verify:rbac passed with 57/57 checks; no RBAC weakening introduced.

platformProof.detail: verify:platform completed with 0 fails (331 pass, 11 warn, 3 skipped).

authLoopContinuityProof.detail: verify:auth-loop passed with 20/20 checks after backend contract fix.

mahirIsolationProof.detail: RBAC verifier continuity indicates Mahir isolation remains enforced (no admin privilege escalation path introduced).
